EN-ES Printable Resource

Science Lab Labels: Explore & Learn (English-Spanish)

Bilingual labels designed for Pre-K to 8th-grade science labs, promoting vocabulary acquisition and safe practices for young learners (ages 3-5).

TopicScience Lab Labels
Age Band3-5
Pack Typeclassroom labels
LanguageEN-ES

✨ What's Inside

  • 15 classroom labels
  • 5 routine cards
  • 4 classroom rules
  • Teacher notes & answer key

📖 How to Use

Print, laminate, and display labels throughout the science lab. Use full-size labels for general areas and large equipment, and small-size labels for bins and specific tools. Post visual routine cards in sequence near the entrance or a designated routine board. Review rules daily at the start of lab activities.

LanternELLTeacher Notes📄 Printable Pack

Teacher Notes

🎯 Objective

To facilitate vocabulary acquisition, promote safety, and establish clear routines in a bilingual science lab setting for young learners.

💡 Suggested Use

Print, laminate, and display labels throughout the science lab. Use full-size labels for general areas and large equipment, and small-size labels for bins and specific tools. Post visual routine cards in sequence near the entrance or a designated routine board. Review rules daily at the start of lab activities.

📦 Materials Needed

  • Printer
  • Laminator
  • Scissors
  • Adhesive (tape, glue dots, or Velcro)

🔀 Differentiation Tips

  • Pair labels with real objects (realia) whenever possible.
  • Encourage students to echo new vocabulary.
  • Use gestures and TPR (Total Physical Response) to demonstrate meaning.
  • Create a 'Science Word Wall' to reinforce new terms.
  • Provide opportunities for students to lead routines using the visual cards.
📄 Terms of Use — personal-classroom-use
✅ Print for your students & classroom use.❌ Do not share, redistribute, or resell files.🏫 School license: support@lanternell.com
